syscalls.name: write
syscalls.args: int fd, const void *buf, size_t nbyte

syscalls.name: open
syscalls.args: const char *path, int flags, mode_t mode

syscalls.name: chown
syscalls.args: const char *path, uid_t uid, gid_t gid

syscalls.name: sigaction
syscalls.args: int sig, const struct sigaction *act, struct sigaction *oact

syscalls.name: socketpair
syscalls.args: int domain, int type, int protocol, int sv[2]

syscalls.name: execve
syscalls.args: const char *path, char *const argv[], char *const envp[]

syscalls.name: select
syscalls.args: int nd, fd_set *in, fd_set *ou, fd_set *ex, struct timeval *tv

syscalls.name: socket
syscalls.args: int domain, int type, int protocol

syscalls.name: connect
syscalls.args: int s, const struct sockaddr *name, socklen_t namelen

syscalls.name: bind
syscalls.args: int s, const struct sockaddr *name, socklen_t namelen

syscalls.name: setsockopt
syscalls.args: int s, int level, int optname, const void *optval, socklen_t optlen

syscalls.name: getsockopt
syscalls.args: int s, int level, int optname, void *optval, socklen_t *optlen

syscalls.name: mmap
syscalls.args: void *addr, size_t len, int prot, int flags, int fd, off_t pos

syscalls.name: lseek
syscalls.args: int fd, off_t offset, int whence

syscalls.name: sysctl
syscalls.args: int *name, u_int namelen, void *old, size_t *oldlenp, void *new, size_t newlen

syscalls.name: kevent
syscalls.args: int kq, const struct kevent *changelist, int nchanges, struct kevent *eventlist, int nevents, const struct timespec *timeout

syscalls.name: kevent64
syscalls.args: int kq, const struct kevent64_s *changelist, int nchanges, struct kevent64_s *eventlist, int nevents, unsigned int flags, const struct timespec *timeout

syscalls.name: shm_open2
syscalls.args: const char *path, int flags, mode_t mode, int shmflags, const char *name

syscalls.name: close_range
syscalls.args: uint flags, int lowfd, int highfd
